title: Tank Cannons
description: Resource pack for CBC and CBC addons
body:
# **CBC Tank Cannons**

_or **LRP-2A**_

This resource pack changes the cannon models and textures to ones that are more suitable for building tanks with **Valkyrien Skyes**.

Also, this resource pack use:

• CBC AT refresh

• CBC MS refresh

• VestTrans (cannon model)
